name: @ts-fix/contracts-effect
description: Canonical effect/Schema home for ts-fix's cross-cutting domain contracts (Diagnostic/Severity/Tier/FixKind/Fix/TextEdit, RuleMeta/Capability, the TsFixConfig family). Consolidation slice — pure contracts (no Effect monad) that existing slices currently vendor; the engine slice is the first consumer that imports from here instead of duplicating.
